title: Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map
summary: With consent, mark people who may need checks, accessible routes, water points, first-aid skills, tools, pets, generators, hazards, and communication gaps.
content: With consent, mark people who may need checks, accessible routes, water points, first-aid skills, tools, pets, generators, hazards, and communication gaps. Keep the detailed map private and share only the information needed for a task. Do not label people publicly by diagnosis, disability, immigration status, wealth, or vulnerability.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map”.
Pencil. Context: “Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map»
steps: With consent, mark people who may need checks, accessible routes, water points, first-aid skills, tools, pets, generators, hazards, and communication gaps.
Keep the detailed map private and share only the information needed for a task.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map.
warnings: Do not label people publicly by diagnosis, disability, immigration status, wealth, or vulnerability.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map.
short_term: For Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Neighbourhood vulnerability and resource map to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
